name: @chbrain/khai-engine-motivation
description: khai engine content, the motivation domain: motivation as process, what moves a persona to act and where the drive springs from.
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: Motivation as process: what moves a persona to act, and where the drive springs from -- intrinsic, identified, introjected, external, or amotivated.

card.wire: Attaches at Process. The root (process_motivation.md) declares motivation as a drive: a need or value meets an available act, and the source of the pull -- inside the act or pressed from outside -- shapes the effort.
card.issue: Five styles a persona may run: intrinsic, identified, introjected, external, and amotivated. Each is a process file composed under the root, so the quality and persistence of the effort follow the source of the drive. The style holds until that source changes.
card.require: Two altitudes hold the engine. The law: declared once in the project's Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the root. The link: each persona links, under Projection, the specific motivation style it runs.
card.enforce: Structure is checked; coherence is judged. The kit verifies the floor: the law is declared and each persona links a real motivation style. Whether the style is true to the act and the persona is semantic, taught and reviewed, never failed by the suite.
card.setup: Declare the law in the Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the root. Then give the persona its read under Projection, linking the specific style. Read it in the first beat; the room enacts it, never narrates it.
